bird.name: Maroon-fronted parrot
bird.summary: The maroon-fronted parrot (Rhynchopsitta terrisi) is a large, macaw-like parrot. It is dark green with a dark red shoulder and a maroon for…

relations.subject: Maroon-fronted parrot
relations.evidence: This bird is considered endangered due to overgrazing and habitat destruction. The ITESM Campus Monterrey carry out environmental education programs and science research in Cumbres de Monterrey National Park and Sierra de Arteaga for the conservation of maroon-fronted parrots
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
